DEMO SLICE — night v2: just-right dark, real photometrics

Generated streets meet the lighting engine: each fire barrel throws light in its own flame's sampled color, 16 levels, flood falloff, max-not-sum, corner-averaged quads. Street lamps stand DARK (act-1 grid power is your pending ruling); survivors burn barrels instead — the darkness rhythm is fire spacing. Judge the mood: too dark, too warm, radius bigger or smaller.
